rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in the component type scope.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use case-provided bounds and visible feature names for range assumptions/guarantees.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type guarantees.
Preserve AADL architecture by respecting component and implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq <variable_name> : bool = <expression>;` to define Boolean variables.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL data types (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons.
